---
title: "Talks"
title-block: false
---

# Talks

::: {.lead style="font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 2.4rem; max-width: 65ch;"}
Conference talks, invited seminars, and public lectures.
:::

## Upcoming

*[None scheduled at the moment — please check back later, or get in touch by [email](mailto:e.pietrostefani@liverpool.ac.uk).]*

## Recent

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Coming soon.** A full record of recent talks will appear here. In the meantime, contact me directly for slides or recordings.
:::
